title: Mt. Everest Expedition
desc: The ultimate challenge via the South Col route. Full logistical support and weather routing.

title: K2 Expedition
desc: Join our elite 1:1 guided ascent of the savage mountain with complete elite Sherpa support.

title: Kangchenjunga Expedition
desc: A demanding, highly technical ascent on the third highest mountain in the world.

title: Lhotse Expedition
desc: Summit the stunning fourth highest peak via the steep Lhotse Face with our expert team.

title: Makalu Expedition
desc: A formidable challenge featuring steep pitching and exposed ridges on the Great Black mountain.

title: Cho Oyu Expedition
desc: A relatively accessible but massively beautiful 8000er offering unparalleled Tibetan plateau views.

title: Dhaulagiri I Expedition
desc: A breathtakingly sheer ascent demanding high cardiovascular fitness and mountain mastery.

title: Manaslu Expedition
desc: Perfect for first-time 8000er climbers, guided comprehensively to ensure high safety standards.

title: Nanga Parbat Expedition
desc: An iconic Pakistani summit requiring world-class perseverance on the monumental Rupal or Diamir faces.

title: Annapurna I Expedition
desc: One of the most extreme climbs globally. Not for the faint of heart. Reserved for elite alpinists.

title: Gasherbrum I Expedition
desc: An isolation-focused Karakoram ascent surrounded by jagged glaciers.

title: Broad Peak Expedition
desc: An excellent introduction to Karakoram 8000m peaks, offering astounding views of K2 directly opposite.

title: Gasherbrum II Expedition
desc: An approachable Karakoram 8000er perfect as a precursor to Everest or K2.

title: Shishapangma Expedition
desc: The only 8000m peak entirely in Tibet, offering a uniquely remote, spiritual ascent.

title: Ama Dablam Expedition
desc: A highly technical and visually stunning climb. Known as the Matterhorn of the Himalayas.

title: Pumori Expedition
desc: A challenging 7000er functioning as a perfect training ground directly overlooking Everest.

title: Baruntse Expedition
desc: A magnificent snow and ice peak requiring traverse via the remote Amphu Labtsa pass.

title: Himlung Himal Expedition
desc: An increasingly popular 7000m objective near the Tibetan border with moderate technical difficulty.

title: Mera Peak Expedition
desc: The highest trekking peak in Nepal. Technically straightforward but challenging altitude.

title: Island Peak Expedition
desc: A classic objective offering stunning panoramas and achievable alpine mixed climbing.

title: Lobuche East Expedition
desc: Ascend dramatic sweeping ridges near Everest base camp for unbeatable views.

title: Thamserku Expedition
desc: A highly technical 6000er towering over Namche Bazaar, perfect for mixed-climbing specialists.
